tasks.name: Buy the most powerful 3-axis CNC mill under $60,000 with at least 800x400 mm table and 4+ stars
tasks.description: Find 3-axis CNC milling machines, filter to models under $60,000 with a minimum table size of 800x400 mm and rating of 4+ stars, sort by spindle power, and add the most powerful qualifying machine to the cart with quantity 1.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main navigation menu option labeled 'CNC Milling Machines'.
In the filters sidebar, click on 'Machine Type' and select the checkbox for '3-Axis'.
Click on the price filter, enter '60000' as the maximum price, and apply the filter.
Locate the 'Table size (X x Y)' filter and set the minimum X value to '800 mm' and the minimum Y value to '400 mm', then apply the filter.
Find the 'Customer Rating' filter and select '4 stars & up'.
Open the 'Sort by' dropdown above the product grid and choose 'Spindle Power - High to Low'.
Click on the first product card in the sorted list (the machine with the highest spindle power that meets the filters).
On the product detail page, locate the quantity field and set the quantity to '1'.
Click the 'Add to Cart' button on the product detail page.

tasks.name: Configure an entry-level CNC mill under $45,000 with ≥7.5 kW spindle, ATC, and coolant system and request a quote
tasks.description: Use the product configurator to select an entry-level CNC milling machine, choose a spindle of at least 7.5 kW, add an automatic tool changer and any coolant system, keep the total price at or below $45,000, and then submit a quote request form.
steps: From the homepage, click on the 'Configurable Machines' or 'Build Your Machine' link in the main navigation.
On the configurator landing page, select the category 'Entry-Level CNC Milling Machine'.
In the spindle options section, identify spindle choices that are 7.5 kW or higher and select the cheapest option that is at least '7.5 kW'.
In the tool changer section, select an option that includes an 'Automatic Tool Changer (ATC)'.
In the coolant options section, select any available coolant system (for example, 'Flood Coolant' or 'Through-Spindle Coolant').

If a price summary is visible and shows a total above $45,000, change any chosen enclosure or accessory option from 'Premium' to the next cheaper available tier (such as 'Standard') until the displayed total is $45,000 or less.
Once the configured price is at or below $45,000, click the 'Request a Quote' or 'Get Quote' button.
On the quote request form, enter 'Alex Miller' in the Name field, 'alex.miller@example.com' in the Email field, and 'Miller Precision Shop' in the Company field.
Enter '555-123-7890' in the Phone field and type 'Entry-level CNC mill configuration under $45k with ≥7.5 kW spindle, ATC, and coolant' into the Comments or Project Details field.
Click the 'Submit Quote Request' button to send the configuration details.

tasks.name: Order two replacement main spindles for a ProMill 500 (2022) that are in stock and the cheapest available
tasks.description: Use the spare parts section to find main spindle replacements for a ProMill 500 machine from model year 2022, filter to parts that are in stock, sort by price, and add two units of the cheapest main spindle to the cart.
steps: From the homepage, click on the 'Support' menu and select 'Spare Parts' from the dropdown.
On the spare parts page, locate the 'Machine Model' dropdown and select 'ProMill 500'.
Find the 'Model Year' filter and select '2022' from the available options.
In the 'Part Category' or 'Component Type' filter, select the checkbox for 'Spindle' or 'Main Spindle'.
Use the availability filter to select 'In Stock' only.
Open the 'Sort by' dropdown and choose 'Price - Low to High'.
In the results list, click on the first item that is labeled 'Main Spindle' or contains 'Main Spindle' in its name.
On the part detail page, change the quantity field from '1' to '2'.
Click the 'Add to Cart' button on the spare part detail page.

tasks.name: Register for the earliest online beginner CNC training course starting after September 1, 2024
tasks.description: Find training courses, filter to online beginner-level CNC courses starting after 2024-09-01, sort by start date, choose the earliest available course, and complete the registration form.
steps: From the homepage, click on the 'Training & Education' or 'Training' link in the main navigation.
On the training overview page, use the 'Delivery Method' filter to select 'Online' only.
Use the 'Level' or 'Skill Level' filter to select 'Beginner' or 'Introductory'.
Open the 'Start Date' or 'Date Range' filter and set the start date to '2024-09-01' or later, then apply the filter.
Use the 'Sort by' control and select 'Start Date - Soonest First'.
In the filtered course list, click on the first course that appears (the earliest online beginner course after the chosen date).
On the course detail page, click the 'Register' or 'Enroll Now' button.
In the registration form, enter 'Jordan Lee' in the Full Name field, 'jordan.lee@example.com' in the Email field, and 'Lee CNC Works' in the Company field.
Enter '555-987-6543' in the Phone field and select '1' as the number of participants if a participant count field is present.
Click the 'Submit Registration' or 'Complete Enrollment' button to finalize the course registration.

tasks.name: Contact the nearest authorized service dealer within 100 km of ZIP code 60601
tasks.description: Use the dealer locator to find dealers within 100 km of ZIP code 60601, filter to authorized service centers, sort by distance, choose the nearest dealer, and send a contact message via the dealer contact form.
steps: On the homepage, click on the 'Where to Buy', 'Find a Dealer', or 'Dealer Locator' link in the main navigation or footer.
In the location search field, type '60601' as the ZIP/postal code.
If a radius or distance dropdown is available, select '100 km' as the search radius.
Use any available filter to select 'Authorized Service Center' or a similar option that indicates authorized service.
Click the 'Search' or 'Find Dealers' button to display nearby results.
If there is a 'Sort by' option above the results, choose 'Distance - Nearest First'.
In the results list, click on the first dealer entry (the nearest authorized service dealer).
On the dealer detail page, click the 'Contact this Dealer' or 'Send Message' button.
Fill in the contact form with 'Taylor Brown' in the Name field, 'taylor.brown@example.com' in the Email field, and 'Precision service request for CNC mill near 60601' in the Message field.
Click the 'Send' or 'Submit' button to send the message to the dealer.

tasks.name: Download the English user manual and safety instructions for the VMC 850 machining center
tasks.description: Navigate to the support downloads, locate the VMC 850 vertical machining center, and download both the English user manual and the English safety instructions PDFs.
steps: From the homepage, open the 'Support' menu and click on 'Downloads' or 'Documentation'.
On the downloads page, use the 'Product Category' filter to select 'Vertical Machining Centers'.
In the 'Model' dropdown or search field, select or type 'VMC 850' and apply the model filter.
Use the 'Document Type' filter to select 'User Manual' and set the language filter to 'English'.
In the filtered list, click the download icon or 'Download' button next to the English user manual for the VMC 850.
Change the 'Document Type' filter to 'Safety Instructions' while keeping the model set to 'VMC 850' and language set to 'English'.
In the updated list, click the download icon or 'Download' button next to the English safety instructions for the VMC 850.

tasks.name: Save the newest aerospace titanium 5-axis machining case study to favorites and copy its link
tasks.description: Browse aerospace industry case studies, filter to 5-axis machining with titanium, sort by newest, open the newest case study, add it to favorites, and copy its shareable link using the provided UI control.
steps: On the homepage, hover over or click the 'Industries' menu and select 'Aerospace' from the dropdown.
On the aerospace page, navigate to the 'Case Studies' or 'Success Stories' section.
Use the 'Machine Type' filter to select '5-Axis Machining Center' or '5-Axis'.
Use the 'Material' or 'Workpiece Material' filter to select 'Titanium'.
Open the 'Sort by' dropdown for the case study list and choose 'Date - Newest First'.
Click on the first case study in the list (the newest titanium 5-axis aerospace case study).
On the case study detail page, click the 'Add to Favorites' or bookmark icon/button.
Click the 'Copy Link', 'Share Link', or similar button that copies the case study URL to the clipboard.

tasks.name: Subscribe to the cheapest maintenance plan under $200/month that includes an annual on-site inspection starting on October 1, 2024
tasks.description: Navigate to maintenance plans, filter to plans that include an annual on-site inspection, limit the monthly price to $200, choose the cheapest qualifying plan, and submit a subscription request starting on 2024-10-01.
steps: From the homepage, click on the 'Services' menu and select 'Maintenance Plans' or 'Service Contracts'.
On the maintenance plans page, use the 'Features' or 'Includes' filter and select the option labeled 'Annual On-Site Inspection'.
Use the price slider or monthly fee filter to set the maximum monthly price to '200' dollars.
If there is a 'Sort by' option for plans, select 'Price - Low to High'.
In the filtered list of plans, click on the first plan displayed (the cheapest plan under $200/month that includes an annual on-site inspection).
On the selected plan’s detail page, click the 'Subscribe', 'Request Subscription', or 'Sign Up' button.
In the subscription form, enter 'Morgan Davis' in the Name field and 'morgan.davis@example.com' in the Email field.
If there is a 'Preferred Start Date' or 'Contract Start Date' field, enter '2024-10-01'.
Enter 'Davis Precision Machining' in the Company field and '555-222-3344' in the Phone field.
Click the 'Submit', 'Send Request', or 'Confirm Subscription' button to complete the subscription request.

entities.name: MachineModel
entities.description: CNC machine models available for sale (used on product listing/detail and for compatibility in other areas).

fields.name: name
fields.description: Model name, e.g., 'ProMill 500', 'VMC 850'

fields.name: productCategory
fields.description: Matches categoryId URL params where applicable

fields.name: tableSizeXmm
fields.description: Table size X dimension in mm

fields.name: tableSizeYmm
fields.description: Table size Y dimension in mm

fields.name: spindlePowerKw
fields.description: Nominal spindle power in kW

fields.name: averageRating
fields.description: Average customer rating 1–5

fields.name: isConfigurable
fields.description: If this model can be configured via configurator

entities.name: Cart
entities.description: Shopping cart (single cart for the agent).

fields.name: items
fields.description: Array of CartItem ids

entities.name: CartItem
entities.description: Individual line items in the shopping cart for machines and spare parts.

fields.name: productId
fields.description: References MachineModel or SparePart depending on itemType

entities.name: ConfigurableMachineCategory
entities.description: High-level configurable machine families used on the configurator landing page.

fields.name: name
fields.description: e.g., 'Entry-Level CNC Milling Machine'

entities.name: ConfigOptionGroup
entities.description: Groups of configuration options (spindle, tool changer, coolant, enclosure, accessories).

fields.name: name
fields.description: Display name, e.g., 'Spindle Options'

entities.name: ConfigOption
entities.description: Individual configuration options within a group (specific spindle, ATC, coolant type, enclosure tier, accessories).

fields.name: name
fields.description: e.g., '7.5 kW Spindle', 'Automatic Tool Changer (ATC)'

fields.name: priceDelta
fields.description: Price difference vs. base configuration

fields.name: powerKw
fields.description: For spindle options, spindle power in kW

fields.name: includesAtc
fields.description: True if this option includes an ATC

entities.name: MachineConfiguration
entities.description: A configured machine instance built in the configurator with chosen options and calculated price.

fields.name: selectedOptionIds
fields.description: Array of ConfigOption ids selected for this configuration

entities.name: QuoteRequest
entities.description: Quote requests submitted from the configurator for configured machines.

entities.name: SparePart
entities.description: Spare parts catalog entries with compatibility, used in spare parts listing and product detail for parts.

fields.name: name
fields.description: e.g., 'Main Spindle for ProMill 500'

fields.name: machineModelId
fields.description: Primary compatible machine model, e.g., ProMill 500

fields.name: compatibleModelYears
fields.description: Array of numeric years (e.g., [2021, 2022]) this part is compatible with

entities.name: TrainingCourse
entities.description: Training and education offerings listed on the training pages.

entities.name: TrainingRegistration
entities.description: Registrations submitted for specific training courses.

entities.name: Dealer
entities.description: Dealers and authorized service centers used in the dealer locator and detail pages.

fields.name: isAuthorizedServiceCenter
fields.description: Supports filter 'Authorized Service Center'

fields.name: serviceCapabilities
fields.description: Array of capability strings, e.g., ['sales', 'authorized_service_center', 'training']

fields.name: coverageRegions
fields.description: Array of region names/identifiers

entities.name: DealerMessage
entities.description: Contact messages sent to specific dealers via dealer detail pages.

entities.name: DownloadableDocument
entities.description: Manuals, safety instructions, and other documents downloadable from the support downloads page.

entities.name: Industry
entities.description: Industry segments served by the manufacturer, e.g., aerospace.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Identifier matching URL param values, e.g., 'aerospace'

entities.name: CaseStudy
entities.description: Case studies and success stories, including aerospace titanium 5-axis machining examples.

fields.name: relatedMachineModelIds
fields.description: Array of MachineModel ids mentioned in the case study

entities.name: CaseStudyFavorite
entities.description: Locally stored favorites for case studies for this single agent.

entities.name: MaintenancePlan
entities.description: Maintenance and service contract plans listed on the maintenance plans page.

fields.name: features
fields.description: Array of feature strings, e.g., includes 'annual_on_site_inspection'

entities.name: MaintenanceSubscriptionRequest
entities.description: Subscription or request forms submitted for maintenance plans.
